zh.lifeSummary: 當William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig於大約1378年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯時，他的父親Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas21歲，母親Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland31歲。他於1400年之前與Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1421年享年45歲，埋葬在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig于大约1378年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯时，他的父亲Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas21岁，母亲Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland31岁。他于1400年之前与Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1421年享年45岁，埋葬在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig was born about 1378, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas, was 21 and his mother, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 31. He married Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer before 1400. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1421, at the age of 45, and was buried in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

fr.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig est né environ 1378, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer avant 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1421, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

de.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig um 1378 in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas 21 und seine Mutter Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland 31. Er hat vor 1400 Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1421 im Alter von 45 Jahren und wurde in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer prima del 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ko.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스
ko.lifeSummary: William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig(이)가 대략 1378년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1400년 이전 Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1421년 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer antes 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Douglas 1st of Drumlanrig родился около 1378 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stewart of Shambothy, Innermeath and Durisdeer перед 1400 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1421 г. в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция.
